systems.name: OpenCode Runtime
systems.description: The per-user daemon and supporting cron subsystem that execute scheduled tasks.

containers.name: Cron Runtime Container
containers.description: Backend runtime surfaces responsible for cron persistence, recovery, and execution visibility.

components.name: Planner Baseline Contract
components.description: Active plan artifacts that consolidate the current durable scheduler truth.

components.name: Heartbeat Supervisor
components.description: Recovers schedules and drives due-job evaluation on the cron heartbeat cadence.

components.name: Cron Job Store
components.description: Persisted cron job definitions and state used for recovery and execution bookkeeping.

components.name: Unix Socket Server Lifecycle
components.description: Real daemon startup surface that must start runtime lifecycle before serving requests.

components.name: Documentation Sync Surface
components.description: Event log and architecture verification outputs that preserve scheduler knowledge.

relationships.description: Defines the validation and hardening scope for heartbeat behavior
Reads and updates persisted cron state for recovery and due-job execution
Starts lifecycle wiring so heartbeat registration actually runs in the real daemon path
Produces runtime evidence that must be recorded in event and architecture sync docs
